selected_title: An empirical study on the impact of knowledge absorptive capacity on service innovation performance
question: Which measurable boundary in “An empirical study on the impact of knowledge absorptive capacity on service innovation performance” changes how Absorptive capacity should be evaluated after “Study on Absorptive Capacity for Enterprises to Obtain Customer Knowledge Oriented CRM”?

evidence_spans.text: Knowledge absorptive capacity has an important impact on the service innovation performance of the service-based enterprise. This paper chooses the competitive advantage and customer satisfaction to measure the service innovation performance, analyzes the impact of knowledge absorptive capacity on the competitive advantage and customer satisfaction, and does an empirical research as the example of service outsourcing enterprises by using the structural equation model. The conclusion is that the improvement of knowledge absorptive capacity is conducive to improving the competitive advantage and customer satisfaction of service outsourcing enterprises, then improving the service innovation performance.

learned_claims: The inspected source addresses Absorptive capacity, Outsourcing through the evidence summarized in the preserved span.
The abstract supplies a direct evidence span of 93 words; interpretation remains bounded to that span.
